name: desafio-banco-carrefour
description: Mobile test automation for WebdriverIO native-demo-app - Desafio Banco Carrefour

scripts.test: wdio run wdio.conf.js; npm run allure:report
scripts.test:login: wdio run wdio.conf.js --spec test/specs/login.test.js; npm run allure:report
scripts.test:signup: wdio run wdio.conf.js --spec test/specs/signUp.test.js; npm run allure:report
scripts.test:navigation: wdio run wdio.conf.js --spec test/specs/navigation.test.js; npm run allure:report
scripts.test:forms: wdio run wdio.conf.js --spec test/specs/forms.test.js; npm run allure:report
scripts.test:browserstack: RUN_ON_BS=true wdio run wdio.conf.js; npm run allure:report
scripts.allure:generate: rm -rf allure-report && allure generate allure-results -o allure-report
scripts.allure:report: npm run allure:generate && npm run allure:open
